summary: W884 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing the W883 source-homological-triangulation leaf with source-triangulation data; the W821/W855 comparison-bijectivity route supplies the category-homology provider, and the result feeds W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the remaining W884 concrete leaf providers, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W884 removes the caller-supplied category-homology part of the W733 source-homological leaf, but the source-triangulation provider and the other W884 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W884 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation and triangle-completion data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the eight W884 source-triangulation concrete leaf providers.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
